comment: data_20.l_0xc660a6 @ world 1616,1616. EB's post-battle Frank scene: Frank (npcId 146, sprite group 153) introduces himself as Fail-proof Frank, loses for the first time, then drops the Giant Step exposition before walking off (raw [1F F1 CA 00 7B 02] departure choreography). EB sets flags 515/64/697/363/364/2 + unset 365; here flag 132 (the placement eventFlag) marks the scene consumed and signal:frank-defeated gates downstream story. Co-located NPCs 163 (grp117) and 202 (grp401) are bystanders, left in place. Door @1592,1680 is the nearest exit Frank shuffles toward.

pages: Name's Frank. Fail-proof Frank, they call me around here. You?
C'mon. A guy beats your face in, the least he gets is a name.
And THIS is the Frankystein Mark II. Built it myself. Never lost with it.
...Huh. First time for everything, I guess.
Fail-proof Frank. Now just... failure Frank. Has a ring to it.
You've been asking around about Giant Step. Fine. I'll talk.
It's a power spot. Real power, the kind that lets certain people pull off miracles.
Problem is some monster crawled in and drank the whole place dry.
Getting there's no picnic either. The path runs behind the entertainers' shack.
Pirkle, the mayor, keeps the key. Go charm it out of him.
You came in stronger than me, kid. And you're only getting started. Now beat it.
